PassingShip.title: Passing ship
PassingShip.description: Our scanners have detected a ship nearby. It should be within communication range shortly.

Asteroids.title: Asteroid field
Asteroids.description: We are passing over an asteroid field. We can attempt to mine some but must be careful of parasites and infections.

Debris.title: Debris
Debris.description: We are detecting some kind of debris nearby, we could scavenge the wreckage for supplies or see if there are any survivors. We must be wary of pirates in the area.

CryoChamber.title: Cryo chamber
CryoChamber.description: There appears to be a Cryo Chamber floating close by. We could see if anyone's inside.

HostileCreatureAssault.title: Assault
HostileCreatureAssault.description: Hostile creatures have been spotted within range of the ship.
